highlights.text: Premium luxury chauffeur-driven AC SUV throughout
Private camel safari and VVIP desert camp at Sam Sand Dunes
Exclusive Lake Pichola boat cruise in Udaipur

itinerary.title: Royal Rajasthan Family Tour
itinerary.overview: Experience the ultimate Royal Rajasthan Family Tour across India's most celebrated land of kings, fortresses, and timeless heritage. From the pink-hued corridors of Jaipur to the golden sand dunes of Jaisalmer, every detail is woven with premium stays, immersive experiences, and handpicked luxury comforts. Route: Jaipur (2N) → Jodhpur (1N) → Jaisalmer (2N) → Udaipur (2N). Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-002 | Royal Rajasthan Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days Rajasthan family package (RJ-002) covering Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer desert safari, and Udaipur with handpicked heritage hotels.

days.title: Jaipur Arrival | Pink City Royal Welcome
days.description: Traditional welcome at your heritage hotel. Visit Birla Mandir and Albert Hall Museum at twilight.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Albert Hall Museum, Birla Temple, Traditional Local Markets
Evening Experience: Johari Bazaar stroll and authentic Rajasthani welcome dinner
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Hotel, Jaipur | Meals: Dinner

days.title: Jaipur | Fortresses of Grandeur
days.description: Comprehensive Jaipur sightseeing: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and Jantar Mantar.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, Jal Mahal
Optional Activities: Hot air balloon ride over Amber Fort at sunrise
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Hotel, Jaipur | Meals: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur | Blue City & Mehrangarh
days.description: Scenic drive to Jodhpur. Explore Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada with panoramic tea service.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, Clock Tower Market
Evening Experience: Panoramic tea service from a boutique terrace cafe
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Heritage Hotel, Jodhpur | Meals: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer | Into the Thar Desert
days.description: Travel to the Golden City. Explore Gadisar Lake at twilight and vibrant local markets.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic overland desert route, Gadisar Lake twilight views
Food Suggestion: Ker Sangri and desert-inspired specialities
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Oasis Resort, Jaisalmer | Meals: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Jaisalmer | Living Fort & Sam Sand Dunes Safari
days.description: Explore Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon ki Haveli, and exclusive camel safari with folk performances at Sam Sand Dunes.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jaisalmer Living Fort, Patwon ki Haveli, Sam Sand Dunes
Curated Experience: VVIP desert camp with live cultural fire dance and stargazing
Overnight Stay: Luxury Desert Camp / Resort, Sam Dunes | Meals: Breakfast & Royal Desert Dinner

days.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur | City of Lakes
days.description: Scenic drive across the Aravalli range to Udaipur. Relaxed evening at Lake Pichola.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic drive across the Aravalli range, evening at Lake Pichola
Evening Experience: Lakeside luxury high tea with views of Jag Mandir palace
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Lakeside Resort, Udaipur | Meals: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Udaipur | City Palace & Private Boat Cruise
days.description: Tour City Palace, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Jagdish Temple, and private Lake Pichola sunset cruise.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Udaipur City Palace, Saheliyon-ki-Bari, Jagdish Temple
Photography Points: Ambrai Ghat and City Palace balconies
Overnight Stay: Ultra-Luxury Lakeside Resort, Udaipur | Meals: Breakfast & Grand Finale Dinner

days.title: Udaipur Departure | Farewell to the Land of Royalty
days.description: Leisurely breakfast, souvenir shopping, and transfer to Udaipur Airport or Railway Station.
activities: Activities Included: Morning souvenir shopping, scheduled luxury airport/station transfer
Meals Included: Gourmet Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: 07 Nights premium accommodation in handpicked heritage hotels
Daily gourmet buffet breakfast and curated royal multi-cuisine dinners
Private transfers and sightseeing via luxury AC SUV with professional chauffeur
Traditional welcome rituals and complimentary welcome amenities upon arrival
Private camel safari, cultural folk programs, and gala desert dinner
Exclusive boat cruise experiences on Lake Pichola in Udaipur
24/7 dedicated TRAGUIN priority concierge support throughout the tour
Domestic or international airfares / train tickets to destination
Monument entrance tickets and camera fees during sightseeing
Personal expenses such as laundry, mini-bar, telephone calls, and tips
Optional adventure sports, hot air ballooning, or vintage car rides
Travel insurance policies or medical expenses
